title: AUTOPLAY TO FRIENDS
description: This modpack automates the setup process for playing with friends. Simply ensure the server has AutoModpack installed, and it will automatically handle installing and updating your friends favorite mods.
body:
![Modpack author banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32f3944bb46c8c0f36d17d720744d26cc1f2dba8_0.webp)

***

##  STOP THE MODDING MADNESS! 

Tired of manually teaching your friends how to install mods or which versions to choose?

This modpack is your **ultimate template** for creating the perfect, hassle-free modding experience!

###  **How It Works (In 3 Steps):**

1.  **Download** this pack.
2.  Change the included **AutoModpack** version to match your server's needs.
3.  **That's it!** The server handles the rest.

All other included mods are **client-side quality-of-life additions** designed to immediately enhance everyone's Minecraft experience!

**Get started today and make modding painless!**
